tasks.label: Backup Prep: Detect OneDrive and HEAD
args: $oneDrive = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'OneDrive'; Write-Host "ONEDRIVE_PATH=$oneDrive"; Write-Host "ONEDRIVE_EXISTS=$((Test-Path $oneDrive))"; Set-Location 'C:\JobReadyIndia\jobready_india'; git rev-parse --short HEAD

tasks.label: Backup: Create OneDrive Zip
args: $src='C:\JobReadyIndia\jobready_india'; $backupDir='C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $backupDir -Force | Out-Null; $stamp=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $commit=(git -C $src rev-parse --short HEAD).Trim(); $zip=Join-Path $backupDir ("jobready_india_{0}_{1}.zip" -f $stamp,$commit); Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $src '*') -DestinationPath $zip -CompressionLevel Optimal -Force; Get-Item $zip | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-List

tasks.label: Backup: Create OneDrive Zip Retry
args: $src="C:\JobReadyIndia\jobready_india"; $backupDir="C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $backupDir -Force | Out-Null; $stamp=Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"; $commit=(git -C $src rev-parse --short HEAD).Trim(); $zip=Join-Path $backupDir ("jobready_india_"+$stamp+"_"+$commit+".zip"); Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $src "*") -DestinationPath $zip -CompressionLevel Optimal -Force; Get-Item $zip | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-List

tasks.label: Backup: Copy latest zip to OneDrive
args: $srcDir='C:\JobReadyIndia\jobready_india\backups'; $dstDir='C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dstDir -Force | Out-Null; $latest=Get-ChildItem -Path $srcDir -Filter 'jobready_lib_backup_*.zip' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; Copy-Item -Path $latest.FullName -Destination $dstDir -Force; Get-ChildItem -Path $dstDir -Filter ($latest.Name) | Select-Object FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-List

tasks.label: Backup: Copy zip to OneDrive via cmd
args: if not exist C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups mkdir C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups && copy /Y C:\JobReadyIndia\jobready_india\backups\jobready_lib_backup_2026-07-19_160035.zip C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups\ && dir C:\Users\Avita\OneDrive\JobReadyIndia_Backups\jobready_lib_backup_2026-07-19_160035.zip
